level_signals: Responsible for attracting, hiring, retaining, and scaling a world-class organization
Communicates strategy to most senior leaders at DoorDash
Comp range $197,200–$290,000 base, consistent with Director-level at a large tech company

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of relevant management experience, ideally within a Marketplace or Subscription-focused business and/or founder experience
Track record of impact – you've been in the trenches and have a proven track record of driving significant, company-wide impact.
Bias to action and agility – you move quickly and thrive in a fast-paced environment. No job is beneath you and you lead from the front.
"Breakthrough walls" mentality – you are constantly pushing the envelope of what is possible and can figure out a way to make almost anything happen. You're a playmaker.
Clarity of thought – you can articulate a clear vision to cross-functional partners.
Skilled executive management and communication, especially at managing up and across DoorDash and going toe to toe with our most senior leaders.
Strong leadership and maturity to build (attract, hire, retain) and scale a world-class organization.
Proven ability to create clarity and focus in complex and ambiguous problem spaces; prioritization and pragmatism.
Demonstrated experience in building the team necessary to fulfill the strategy. Proactively involved in recruiting, mentoring, and developing team members.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of relevant management experience, ideally within a Marketplace or Subscription-focused business and/or founder experience
10+ years of relevant management experience, ideally within a Marketplace or Subscription-focused business and/or founder experience

scope.surface: DashPass — DoorDash's global subscription program; Growth & Lifecycle strategy and execution
scope.business_model: B2C subscription (DashPass) within a marketplace platform
core_responsibilities: Lead Growth & Lifecycle strategy and execution for DashPass
Drive DashPass' definition, strategy, and long-term vision
Partner closely with cross-functional teams leading customer acquisition, increasing customer value, increasing profitability
Manage and develop a team of all-stars
Communicate strategy, benefits, and results to all audiences including the management team
Apply deep expertise and industry best practices to drive innovation

green_flags: High-visibility role leading one of DoorDash's highest-priority businesses
Clear ownership of DashPass growth & lifecycle strategy
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Position fill deadline stated (7/6/26), indicating active search
red_flags: Location type not specified in JD body — unclear if remote, hybrid, or onsite
Role responsibilities are written in aspirational/marketing language ('visible from space impact', 'invent the future') with limited operational specificity
Very wide comp band ($93K spread) may indicate significant location-based pay differential or seniority ambiguity

ambiguities: The 10+ years requirement uses 'ideally' for the marketplace/subscription qualifier — treated the base 10+ years as hard and the domain qualifier as a nice-to-have.

Location is entirely unstated in the JD body; comp range is described as 'national base pay range within the United States, including Illinois and Colorado,' suggesting possible remote or multi-location eligibility, but this is not confirmed.
